sources.title: New Research on Agentic Commerce Finds Gap Between Consumer and Merchant Expectations
claims_supported: Gap between consumer readiness and merchant infrastructure for agentic commerce
55% of consumers have knowingly used a retailer's AI assistant (Amazon Rufus, Walmart Sparky)
52% of US shoppers planned to use GenAI for shopping within one year of mid-2025

unverified_claims: Walmart pilot programs using AI agents for bulk order aggregation reducing per-unit carbon footprint by 17% — no primary source found
Exact search volume for 'agentic commerce' keyword (~120K/mo) — estimate based on adoption metrics, not SEMrush/Ahrefs data
2-5% agentic platform fee estimate — referenced in analyst discussions but no published rate card found
notes: Growth metrics interpretation: growth_1y '+1,400%' based on Shopify's verified 15x agentic traffic growth January 2025 to January 2026. growth_3m '+805%' based on Checkout.com's reported AI shopping traffic growth metric. growth_5y '+∞' reflects category birth from near-zero — ChatGPT plugins launched late 2023, meaningful agentic shopping commerce infrastructure only established 2025.
